meaning: n.[化]六氯环己烷,六氯化苯,六六六
examples: Technique of microwave extraction and GC-ECD was used to analyze hexachlorocyclohexane BHC and DDT in soil.
A capillary gas chromatography method was developed for determining hexachlorocyclohexane (HCH) pesticide in fish using gel permeation chromatography (GPC).
The feasibility of photocatalytic degradation of hexachlorocyclohexane(BHC) in groundwater with titanium dioxide was proved by a series of experimental investigations.
